title: juncus elbrusicus
intro: Juncus elbrusicus, also known as Elbrus rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing irritated mucous membranes, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Juncus elbrusicus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
